text.title: Roadmap Design Examples
text.summary: Two Now-Next-Later roadmap examples — a B2B SaaS product and a solo indie product — showing how themes tie to objectives and how "Later" is capped with explicit exclusions.

example.note: Internal Now-Next-Later with three themes, confidence levels, and explicit "Not Doing."
example.code:
## NOW (Q1 — Objective: Reduce time-to-value) Theme: Onboarding - Guided setup wizard — In Progress — High confidence - Template library (5 defaults) — Planned — High confidence
Theme: Performance - API response p95 < 200ms — Planned — High confidence
## NEXT (Q2 — Objective: Enterprise readiness) Theme: Collaboration - Team roles and permissions — Confidence: High - Slack integration — Confidence: Medium
Theme: Compliance - SOC 2 audit prep — Confidence: Medium - Depends on: security review complete by end of Q1
## LATER (exploring, cap 8 items) - Mobile app (pending user research validation) - AI-powered insights (spike needed)
Not Doing: - On-premise deployment — not in ICP; revisit if 3 enterprise deals blocked - White-labeling — low demand signal this quarter

example.note: Solo indie product, 3 themes max per period, shorter horizons.
example.code:
## NOW Theme: Core polish (drives: MLP target) - Payment integration — In Progress - Error message improvements — Planned - Basic usage analytics — Planned
## NEXT Theme: Growth (drives: referral goal) - Email drip sequence — Confidence: High - Referral program — Confidence: Medium
## LATER - Template marketplace (external contribution model — unvalidated) - Team features (no demand signal yet)
Not Doing: - Mobile app — responsive web covers 95% of sessions - Zapier integration — API-first is Q3 at earliest
